chapter_1.title: free. fun. effective
chapter_1.text: Learning with Maestro is fun, and what's more it really works ! With our short and interactive lessons, earn points, progress through the levels and develop your developer skills

chapter_2.title: a scientific method
chapter_2.text: We use research-based teaching methods combined with fun content to create lessons that effectively teach written and oral comprehension and expression!

chapter_3.title: motivation always at the top
chapter_3.text: We help you get into the habit of practicing languages thanks to our fun features and fun challenges.

chapter_4.title: personalized learning
chapter_4.text: Designed to adapt to your level and help you learn at your own pace, our lessons combine the best of artificial intelligence and linguistics.

chapter_5.title: maestro certification
chapter_5.text: Our practical, quick and affordable test integrates the latest assessment and artificial intelligence technologies. You can now assess your developer level precisely, whenever you want, wherever you want.
